revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Superstition |state = {{{state|collapsed}}} |title = [[Superstition]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Main topics |list1 = * [[Amulet]] * [[Evil eye]] * [[Luck]] * [[Omen]] * [[Talisman]]s * [[Myth and ritual]]
|group2 = Lists |list2 = * [[List of superstitions]] * [[List of lucky symbols]] * [[List of bad luck signs]] * [[Sailors' superstitions]] * [[Theatrical superstitions]]
|group3 = Africa |list3 = * [[Superstition in Ethiopia]] * [[Buda (folklore)|Buda]] * [[Gris-gris (talisman)|Gris-gris]] * [[Sampy]] * [[Sleeping child]]
|group4 = Americas |list4 = * ''[[Ascalapha odorata]]'' * [[Bermuda Triangle]] * [[Witchcraft in Latin America|Brujería]] * [[Carranca]] * [[Cooties]] * [[Curse of Tippecanoe]] * [[Curupira]] * [[Djucu]] * [[Fortune cookie]] * [[Groundhog Day]] * [[I'noGo tied]] * [[Oscar love curse]] * [[Susto]] * [[Veve]] * [[White lighter myth]] * [[Witch window]]
|group5 = Asia |list5 = * [[Superstition in India]] * [[Superstition in Pakistan]] * [[Superstition in the Philippines]] * [[Japanese superstitions]] * [[Superstition in Korea]] * [[Bhoot (ghost)|''Bhoot'' (ghost)]] * [[Chhaupadi]] * [[Churel]] * [[Ghosts in Bengali culture]] * [[Jackal's horn]] * [[Kuai Kuai culture]] * [[Muhurta]] * [[Navaratna]] * [[Nazar (amulet)|Nazar]] * [[Nazar battu]] * [[Pichal Peri]] * [[Puppy pregnancy syndrome]] * [[Akabeko]] * [[Kanai Anzen]] * [[Maneki-neko]] * [[Okiagari-koboshi]] * [[Ofuda]] * [[Omamori]] * [[Fan death]] * [[Feng shui]] * [[Hindu astrology]] * [[Agimat]] * [[Albularyo]] * [[Witchcraft in the Philippines|Barang]] * [[Kulam]] * [[Lihi]] * [[Pagtatawas]] * [[Pasma]] * [[Usog]] * [[Kuman Thong]] * [[Palad khik]] * [[Takrut]] * [[Nang Kwak]] * [[Vastu shastra]] * [[White elephant (animal)|White elephant]] * [[Jin Chan]] * [[Chinese numerology|Numbers in Chinese culture]] * [[Yantra cloth]]
<!-- group6 skipped for bckgnd color --> |group7 = Europe |list7 = * [[August curse]] * [[Barbary macaques in Gibraltar]] * [[Bayern-luck]] * [[Blarney Stone]] * [[Cimaruta]] * [[Cornicello]] * [[The Goodman's Croft]] * ''[[Himmelsbrief]]'' * [[Icelandic magical staves]] * ''[[In bocca al lupo]]'' * [[Kitchen witch]] * [[Klabautermann]] * [[Mooncalf]] * [[Need-fire]] * [[Scottish painted pebbles|Painted pebbles]] * [[Powder of sympathy]] * [[Rabbit rabbit rabbit]] * [[Ravens of the Tower of London]] * [[Russian traditions and superstitions]] * [[Superstition in Britain]] * [[Superstition in Serbia]] * [[Spilling water for luck]] * ''[[The Scottish Play]]'' * [[Troll cross]] * [[Tycho Brahe days]] * [[Witch post]] * ''[[Wolfssegen]]''
|group8 = General |list8 = * [[1]] ([[Ace of spades]]) * [[3]] ([[Three on a match]]) * [[4]] ([[Four-leaf clover]], [[tetraphobia]]) * [[7]] ([[Seventh son of a seventh son]]) * [[11:11 (numerology)|11:11]] * [[13_(number)#Luck|13]] ([[Friday the 13th]], [[The Thirteen Club]], [[thirteenth floor]], [[triskaidekaphobia]]) * [[17_(number)#In_other_fields|17]] ([[Heptadecaphobia]]) * [[27_(number)|27]] ([[27 Club]]) * [[39_(number)|39]] ([[Curse of 39]]) * [[666 (number)|666]] ([[Number of the beast|Number of the Beast]]) * [[Auspicious wedding dates]] * [[Baseball superstition]] * [[Beginner's luck]] * [[Black cat]] * [[Bread and butter (superstition)|Bread and butter]] * [[Break a leg]] * [[Bullroarer]] * [[Chain letter]] * [[Cramp-ring]] * [[Curse]] * [[Davy Jones' Locker]] * [[Dead man's hand]] * [[End-of-the-day betting effect]] * [[Fear of frogs]] * [[Fear of ghosts]] * [[Fertility rite]] * [[First-foot]] * ''[[Flying Dutchman]]'' * [[Four eleven forty-four]] * [[Gambler's conceit]] * [[List of lucky symbols|Good luck charm]] * [[Human sacrifice]] * [[Jinx]] * [[Curse|Hex]] * [[Knocking on wood]] * [[Law of contagion]] * [[Literomancy]] * [[Lock of hair]] * [[Maternal impression]] * [[Miasma theory]] * [[Nelson (cricket)|Nelson]] * [[Numerophobia]] * [[Numismatic charm]] * [[Penny]] * [[Rabbit's foot]] * [[Rainmaking (ritual)|Rainmaking]] * [[Ship sponsor]] * [[Shoes on a table]] * [[Sign of the horns]] * [[Something old]] * [[Spilling salt]] * [[Statue rubbing]] * [[Threshold (door)|Threshold]] * [[Toi toi toi]] * [[Wishing well]] * [[Witch ball]] * [[Witching hour]]
|group9 = Related |list9 = * [[Apophenia]] * [[Apotropaic magic]] * [[Astrology and science]] * [[Coincidence]] * [[Debunker]] * [[Divination]] * [[Folk religion]] * [[Fortune-telling]] * [[Magic and religion]] * [[Magical thinking]] * [[Numerology]] * [[Obsessive–compulsive disorder]] * [[Perceptions of religious imagery in natural phenomena]] * [[Post hoc ergo propter hoc]] * [[Questionable cause]] * [[Superstition in Judaism]] * [[Superstitions in Muslim societies]] * [[Traditional medicine]] * [[Urban legend]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:

|group3 = Africa |list3 = * [[Superstition in Ethiopia]] * [[Buda (folklore)|Buda]] * [[Gris-gris (talisman)|Gris-gris]] * [[Sampy]] * [[Sleeping child]]
|group4 = Americas |list4 = * ''[[Ascalapha odorata]]'' * [[Bermuda Triangle]] * [[Witchcraft in Latin America|Brujería]] * [[Carranca]] * [[Cooties]] * [[Curse of Tippecanoe]] * [[Curupira]] * [[Djucu]] * [[Fortune cookie]] * [[Groundhog Day]] * [[I'noGo tied]] * [[Oscar love curse]] * [[Susto]] * [[Veve]] * [[White lighter myth]] * [[Witch window]]
|group5 = Asia |list5 = * [[Superstition in India]] * [[Superstition in Pakistan]] * [[Superstition in the Philippines]] * [[Japanese superstitions]] * [[Superstition in Korea]] * [[Bhoot (ghost)|''Bhoot'' (ghost)]] * [[Chhaupadi]] * [[Churel]] * [[Ghosts in Bengali culture]] * [[Jackal's horn]] * [[Kuai Kuai culture]] * [[Muhurta]] * [[Navaratna]] * [[Nazar (amulet)|Nazar]] * [[Nazar battu]] * [[Pichal Peri]] * [[Puppy pregnancy syndrome]] * [[Akabeko]] * [[Kanai Anzen]] * [[Maneki-neko]] * [[Okiagari-koboshi]] * [[Ofuda]] * [[Omamori]] * [[Fan death]] * [[Feng shui]] * [[Hindu astrology]] * [[Agimat]] * [[Albularyo]] * [[Witchcraft in the Philippines|Barang]] * [[Kulam]] * [[Lihi]] * [[Pagtatawas]] * [[Pasma]] * [[Usog]] * [[Kuman Thong]] * [[Palad khik]] * [[Takrut]] * [[Nang Kwak]] * [[Vastu shastra]] * [[White elephant (animal)|White elephant]] * [[Jin Chan]] * [[Chinese numerology|Numbers in Chinese culture]] * [[Yantra cloth]]
<!-- group6 skipped for bckgnd color --> |group7 = Europe |list7 = * [[August curse]] * [[Barbary macaques in Gibraltar]] * [[Bayern-luck]] * [[Blarney Stone]] * [[Cimaruta]] * [[Cornicello]] * [[The Goodman's Croft]] * ''[[Himmelsbrief]]'' * [[Icelandic magical staves]] * ''[[In bocca al lupo]]'' * [[Kitchen witch]] * [[Klabautermann]] * [[Mooncalf]] * [[Need-fire]] * [[Scottish painted pebbles|Painted pebbles]] * [[Powder of sympathy]] * [[Rabbit rabbit rabbit]] * [[Ravens of the Tower of London]] * [[Russian traditions and superstitions]] * [[Superstition in Britain]] * [[Superstition in Serbia]] * [[Spilling water for luck]] * ''[[The Scottish Play]]'' * [[Troll cross]] * [[Tycho Brahe days]] * [[Witch post]] * ''[[Wolfssegen]]''
|group8 = General |list8 = * [[1]] ([[Ace of spades]]) * [[3]] ([[Three on a match]]) * [[4]] ([[Four-leaf clover]], [[tetraphobia]]) * [[7]] ([[Seventh son of a seventh son]]) * [[11:11 (numerology)|11:11]] * [[13_(number)#Luck|13]] ([[Friday the 13th]], [[The Thirteen Club]], [[thirteenth floor]], [[triskaidekaphobia]]) * [[17_(number)#In_other_fields|17]] ([[Heptadecaphobia]]) * [[27_(number)|27]] ([[27 Club]]) * [[39_(number)|39]] ([[Curse of 39]]) * [[666 (number)|666]] ([[Number of the beast|Number of the Beast]]) * [[Auspicious wedding dates]] * [[Baseball superstition]] * [[Beginner's luck]] * [[Black cat]] * [[Bread and butter (superstition)|Bread and butter]] * [[Break a leg]] * [[Bullroarer]] * [[Chain letter]] * [[Cramp-ring]] * [[Curse]] * [[Davy Jones' Locker]] * [[Dead man's hand]] * [[End-of-the-day betting effect]] * [[Fear of frogs]] * [[Fear of ghosts]] * [[Fertility rite]] * [[First-foot]] * ''[[Flying Dutchman]]'' * [[Four eleven forty-four]] * [[Gambler's conceit]] * [[List of lucky symbols|Good luck charm]] * [[Human sacrifice]] * [[Jinx]] * [[Curse|Hex]] * [[Knocking on wood]] * [[Law of contagion]] * [[Literomancy]] * [[Lock of hair]] * [[Maternal impression]] * [[Miasma theory]] * [[Nelson (cricket)|Nelson]] * [[Numerophobia]] * [[Numismatic charm]] * [[Penny]] * [[Rabbit's foot]] * [[Rainmaking (ritual)|Rainmaking]] * [[Ship sponsor]] * [[Shoes on a table]] * [[Sign of the horns]] * [[Something old]] * [[Spilling salt]] * [[Statue rubbing]] * [[Threshold (door)|Threshold]] * [[Toi toi toi]] * [[Wishing well]] * [[Witch ball]] * [[Witching hour]]
|group9 = Related |list9 = * [[Apophenia]] * [[Apotropaic magic]] * [[Astrology and science]] * [[Coincidence]] * [[Debunker]] * [[Divination]] * [[Folk religion]] * [[Fortune-telling]] * [[Magic and religion]] * [[Magical thinking]] * [[Numerology]] * [[Obsessive–compulsive disorder]] * [[Perceptions of religious imagery in natural phenomena]] * [[Post hoc ergo propter hoc]] * [[Questionable cause]] * [[Superstition in Judaism]] * [[Superstitions in Muslim societies]] * [[Traditional medicine]] * [[Urban legend]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
